title: cyclopogon americanus
intro: Cyclopogon americanus is a type of orchid native to Central and South America, commonly known as the American cyclopogon or American needle orchid. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyclopogon americanus include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cyclopogon americanus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
